# Workflows

Get selected workflows' information in table, json or yaml formats.

Use command options for workflows' filtering.

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_workflows.help:output
```

## Example: failed workflows

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_workflows.failed:iserver.output.default
```

## Example: power related in last 7 days

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_workflows.power:iserver.output.default
```

## Example: JSON output

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_workflows.json:iserver.output.default
```
